allow: Bash(node -e 'let d="";process.stdin.on\("data",c=>d+=c\).on\("end",\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);const collab=j.tracks.find\(t=>Array.isArray\(t.artists\)&&t.artists.length>1\);console.log\("sample collab:",collab?`${collab.name} | artist="${collab.artist}" | artists=${JSON.stringify\(collab.artists\)}`:"\(none found\)"\);console.log\("tracks with artists[] field:",j.tracks.filter\(t=>Array.isArray\(t.artists\)\).length,"/",j.tracks.length\);}\)')
